title: FYI ГўВҖВ” November 2025
body_text:
FYI ГўВҖВ” November 2025
FYI ГўВ”ВҖ November 2025
The following updates were made to the Payment Solutions Manual.
Bill Payments Volume
Online Tracing System Part
We updated the list of trace reasons available for selection. A trace can be requested because of a ГўВҖВңDuplicate PaymentГўВҖВқ, a ГўВҖВңFraudulent TransactionГўВҖВқ, or ГўВҖВңOtherГўВҖВқ.  Screenshots throughout the part have also been updated.
Clearing and Deposits Volume
FX Drafts Part
Section 1.3, Contacts, Websites, and Other Resources
We updated ConveraГўВҖВҷs email contact information for draft void inquiries, requesting stop payments, and draft refunds. Send any  email inquiries for the aforementioned to
customercare@contact.convera.com
.
Questions
Central 1, Client Support Services, phone
1-888-889-7878
, Option 1, email
support@central1.com
.
